title: Global Proteomics Indicates Subcellular-Specific Anti-Ferroptotic Responses to Ionizing Radiation.
author: Christopher JA Breckels LM Crook OM Vazquez-Chantada M Barratt D Lilley KS
content: S-EPMC11780130 PMC11780130 Global Proteomics Indicates Subcellular-Specific Anti-Ferroptotic Responses to Ionizing Radiation. Cells have many protective mechanisms against background levels of ionizing radiation orchestrated by molecular changes in expression, post-translational modifications
